title: The Horizon Feels Real
description: A Pretty but Optimized Modpack built on the Distant Horizons Mod, a mod that loads more chunks whit less lag.
body: The Horizon feels real is a Modpack built on making Distant Horizons, a mod that loads more chunks whit less lag using LOD's, Prettier and Faster, It uses many Optimization mods and QoL mods, it also use some Cool mods like the Chat Heads mod.
